chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 829 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6079/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6080/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6081/2025 (R/Surety) 30.10.2025 Mr. Waseem Ahmed Sundrani, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by applicant Zeeshan Ali seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that Abdul Fateh Samejo, who on 10.09.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing photocopy of defence saving certificate amounting to Rs.50,000/- as original is attached in another bail application, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 15.09.2025 which has confirmed, as is evident from order dated 22.09.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
